title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology explores how AI detects zero-day vulnerabilities faster than humans and shapes cybersecurity defense strategies. The video examines AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps as tools for making systems safer, positioning AI as both a capability and a potential risk in security.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI detects zero-day vulnerabilities faster than human analysts and how that capability reshapes cybersecurity defense. The video covers AI-driven vulnerability scanning and the integration of security into DevSecOps workflows as methods for hardening systems. It frames AI as dual-use: a tool for finding and closing security gaps, and a potential risk when the same detection power can be turned toward offense.
